name: Cumin Sticks

ingredients.item: Blend together flour, salt, mustard, and cheese.
Add melted butter, egg yolk, ouzo, and water, mixing to form a soft dough.
Roll out dough to a thickness of ¼ inch and cut into 3 × ½-inch strips, or cut into various shapes with a cookie cutter.
Place on a greased cookie sheet.
Brush with egg white and sprinkle with cumin seeds.
Bake for 15 minutes or until light brown.
